mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bus_city_codes ( city_code, city_name, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE city_name = VALUES(city_name), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO bus_stops ( node_id, node_name, node_no, city_code, latitude, longitude, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{nodeNo}, #{cityCode}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE node_name = VALUES(node_name), node_no = VALUES(node_no), city_code = VALUES(city_code), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT node_id, node_name, node_no, city_code, latitude, longitude, ( CAST(6371000.0 AS DOUBLE) * ACOS( LEAST(CAST(1.0 AS DOUBLE), GREATEST(CAST(-1.0 AS DOUBLE), COS(RADIANS(CAST(#{latitude} AS DOUBLE))) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(latitude AS DOUBLE))) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(longitude AS DOUBLE)) - RADIANS(CAST(#{longitude} AS DOUBLE))) + SIN(RADIANS(CAST(#{latitude} AS DOUBLE))) * SIN(RADIANS(CAST(latitude AS DOUBLE))) )) ) ) AS distance_m FROM v_bus_stops_with_city WHERE latitude BETWEEN CAST(#{latitude} AS DOUBLE) - (CAST(#{radiusMeters} AS DOUBLE) / CAST(111320.0 AS DOUBLE)) AND CAST(#{latitude} AS DOUBLE) + (CAST(#{radiusMeters} AS DOUBLE) / CAST(111320.0 AS DOUBLE)) AND longitude BETWEEN CAST(#{longitude} AS DOUBLE) - (CAST(#{radiusMeters} AS DOUBLE) / (CAST(111320.0 AS DOUBLE) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(#{latitude} AS DOUBLE))))) AND CAST(#{longitude} AS DOUBLE) + (CAST(#{radiusMeters} AS DOUBLE) / (CAST(111320.0 AS DOUBLE) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(#{latitude} AS DOUBLE))))) ) nearby WHERE distance_m <= #{radiusMeters} ORDER BY distance_m ASC LIMIT #{limit}
